name: codex-claude-bridge
description: Wraps OpenAI Codex (GPT-5.4-class) inside Claude Code as an adversarial reviewer, execution rescue tool, parallel delegation surface, and Codex-methods skill suite. Five slash commands (/codex:setup, /codex:review, /codex:adversarial-review, /codex:rescue, /codex:status) plus five agentic skills: implement-with-codex (parallel delegation), adversarial-plan-review (Kashef planning loop with 6 locked categories), browser-verify (Playwright MCP / @browseruse / Codex Chrome plugin verification), failure-as-knowledge (deduped AGENTS.md error log), and agents-md-sync (lean AGENTS.md ↔ CLAUDE.md sync). Hard-coded 7-attack-surface taxonomy and structured-JSON output for closed-loop plan-mode integration.
